body:
x07-mcp-test (private alpha)

USAGE:
  x07-mcp-test <COMMAND> [OPTIONS]

COMMANDS:
  doctor
  conformance run
  replay record
  replay verify
  trust verify
  bundle verify

OPTIONS:
  --machine json
  -h, --help
  -V, --version

CONFORMANCE RUN OPTIONS:
  --url <STR>        MCP HTTP URL to verify (required)
  --full-suite       Run the full official conformance suite
  --baseline <PATH>  Expected failures baseline YAML file
  --out <PATH>       Output directory

REPLAY RECORD OPTIONS:
  --url <STR>           MCP HTTP URL
  --out <PATH>          Session output path (required)
  --scenario <STR>      Scenario to record (default: smoke/basic)
  --auth-bearer <STR>   Optional Authorization: Bearer token

REPLAY VERIFY OPTIONS:
  --session <PATH>      Session file to replay (required)
  --url <STR>           MCP HTTP URL
  --out <PATH>          Output directory

TRUST VERIFY OPTIONS:
  --server-json <PATH>  MCP registry server.json file (required)
  --out <PATH>          Output JSON report path

BUNDLE VERIFY OPTIONS:
  --server-json <PATH>  MCP registry server.json file (required)
  --mcpb <PATH>         MCP bundle (.mcpb) file (required)
  --out <PATH>          Output JSON report path
decls.name: app._help_text_v1
